title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Madhepura
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Madhepura constituency.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Madhepura
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Madhepura assembly segment.

title: High stakes battle in Madhepura as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Madhepura. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Madhepura
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Madhepura assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Madhepura draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Madhepura promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
